reviews.comment:
Te hacen hacer una sola fila con la excusa de que la conexión para cobro es lenta. Lo cierto es que podrias pagar con efectivo pero ellos hacen una sola fila xq asi tienen tiempo de limpiar los vidrios y ganar una propina y te hacen esperar 20min de cola.

(Translated by Google)
They make you stand in a single line with the excuse that the payment connection is slow. The truth is you could pay with cash, but they create a single line so they have time to clean the windows and earn a tip, making you wait in line for 20 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJNDZXeTVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos en ese.parador con lugar verde al aire libre y baños limpios!

(Translated by Google)
We always stop at that inn with its green outdoor space and clean bathrooms!
